name: proxy-smart
description: Administer a SMART on FHIR authorization proxy from your AI. Bundles the proxy-smart admin skill + the hosted proxy-smart MCP server (api.proxy-smart.com) so any agent can manage SMART apps, client scopes, and healthcare users, read FHIR, and search the platform docs — all through the proxy's audited admin API. Sign in on first use; the admin role is required for changes.
